temporal_description: A close-up shot focuses on a hand, its fingers wrapped in a white bandage. The hand is covered in a dark, wet-looking substance, which appears to be blood, staining the fingers and the bandage. The background is dark and out of focus, keeping the attention solely on the injured hand. In the top left corner, white Chinese characters, "风行网," are visible. The camera is static, holding a tight, detailed shot of the hand. The audio features a slow, melancholic instrumental piece. A high-pitched, mournful melody, likely played on a string instrument, creates a somber and deeply sorrowful atmosphere. The music is atmospheric and poignant, evoking a sense of sadness and struggle. There is no dialogue or other sound effects, allowing the mournful score to dominate the soundscape. The camera cuts to an extreme close-up of a man's face. His skin is glistening with sweat, and his expression is one of intense distress and pain. His eyes are wide and appear to be welling up with tears. The lighting is dim and cool-toned, highlighting the sweat on his skin. The white Chinese characters, "风行网," remain in the top left corner. The camera remains static, capturing the raw emotion on the man's face.
